jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at DMart
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with DMart! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!
